title: VLM (gift_v1) status request
description: Standard-protocol 'status' request. Wire format is ZMQ multipart of raw NumPy bytes (frame 0 = JSON header, frames 1..N = arr.tobytes()); see protocol/schemas/status.json. One CURRENT frame per call -- the server keeps a rolling buffer and samples a window for the VLM.

reset.description: Clear the rolling frame buffer before appending this frame (e.g. at the start of a new clip/task).
